title: Personality wise HaAsuka or QAsuka
wikitext:
[]: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by WunderBah » Mon May 09, 2016 5:17 pm Which of the two do you find more likable in terms of overall personality? 2.0 Asuka or 3.0 Asuka?

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 09, 2016 5:28 pm Eyepatch is best personality.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon May 09, 2016 5:31 pm ^^^ This SPOILER: Show

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Reichu » Mon May 09, 2016 11:18 pm This is a no brainer. Q!Asuka is the only one I can get behind without reservations.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Gendo'sPapa » Tue May 10, 2016 12:59 am I like both but there's a lot more going on with Asuka in part 3. And like a lot of the great character work in 3.0 it's all there on screen but is being told subtly in a series that has never been known for subtlety. Once you look past all the grand, in-your-face plot surface elements of the film the character work is pretty divine with Asuka & especially Misato being the best. Plus as previously stated, she has an eyepatch. And a cool kitten ears cap.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by NemZ » Tue May 10, 2016 4:20 am Ha if I had to pick, but if neither is an option I'd go with that instead.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Signer » Tue May 10, 2016 9:36 am Soryu > Q > Ha, because her giving up in Ha was pretty painful to watch.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by pwhodges » Tue May 10, 2016 9:50 am Since Q shows us her development following on from Ha , I see no reason to choose - as they are both aspects of her.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Bagheera » Tue May 10, 2016 10:10 am pwhodges wrote: Since Q shows us her development following on from Ha , I see no reason to choose - as they are both aspects of her.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by IronEvangelion » Sat May 14, 2016 9:35 am Definitely Q Asuka, she's quite a bit more mature than she used to be.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Kendrix » Tue May 31, 2016 2:53 am Bagheera wrote: Pretty much agree. I like the fact that she has her act together in Q, but they're the same person so it's hard to express a preference. I do hope she gets a chance to chill out and let go of some of that anger, though.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by bobbyfischer's ghost » Sat Jun 04, 2016 12:17 pm Q Asuka for me.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Sat Jun 04, 2016 4:22 pm Q Asuka is the elite ace bad-ass that Sohryu and Hasuka claimed to be and shows it by deed instead of by word. One of the things I like most about her is that she doesn't tell anyone how great she is anymore. She just is good and none of her companions doubt it. But as others have said, I can't see them as distinct characters since one directly flows from the experiences of the other.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Reichu » Sat Jun 04, 2016 5:45 pm We're not supposed to see them as distinct characters, we're just supposed to pick which phase we prefer. Nothing anything especially odd about finding someone more likable during one part of their life than another.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jun 13, 2016 12:15 am As much as I've always leaned towards Asuka in her teenage years, I immensely enjoy witnessing an Asuka who's mentally more of an adult than before.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by silvermoonlight » Fri Jul 15, 2016 3:32 am Eye patch Q because I enjoyed the new and more adult perspective on her character.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 18, 2016 10:09 am ^ That, and the image of Space Pirate Asuka is truly one of the greatest blessings Anno has bestowed upon us.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Jul 18, 2016 10:35 am Even though Misato's the one channeling Harlock

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by FreakyFilmFan4ever » Mon Jul 18, 2016 11:07 am Misato is channeling Captain Nemo from The Secret of Blue Water, while Ritsuko is channeling Electra from the same show. Shinji is finally channeling his design gender-swapped, dark skin doppelganger Nadia.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by Arcadia's legacy » Mon Jul 18, 2016 11:31 am While it's true she's channeling Nemo, Nemo himself was pretty much an amalgam of the original book Nemo, Okita and Harlock, so you could say Misato's indirectly channeling Harlock
summary:
[]: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by WunderBah » Mon May 09, 2016 5:17 pm Which of the two do you find more likable in terms of overall personality? 2.0 Asuka or 3.0 Asuka?

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka or Q!Asuka?             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Mon May 09, 2016 5:28 pm Eyepatch is best personality.

[]: Re: Personality wise: Ha!Asuka
